title: Discrete random variables
summary: 9709 S1 — probability distributions, E(X), Var(X), and linear transforms with GeoGebra.
learningObjectives: Apply rules for E(aX + b) and Var(aX + b).

simpleExplanation.title: Random X with a table
simpleExplanation.summary: List all values of X with probabilities summing to 1. Expectation is the probability-weighted mean.

sections.content: **Discrete random variables** (5.4) lead to **binomial** and **normal** work. Always define **X** before writing the distribution table.
